scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every practical GET list/detail endpoint documented by the official Watchmode API (verified against the official @watchmode/api-client v1.0.1 TypeScript SDK's generated route table, which mirrors the interactive API Explorer at api.watchmode.com/docs) is now covered_by a stream. Watchmode publishes no write/mutation endpoints at all (it is a read-only media metadata API) other than a GET-based user-feedback endpoint (title/{id}/incorrect-data), so capabilities.write stays false and this bundle ships no writes.json.

excluded.reason: typeahead/autocomplete helper for building a search UI, not a syncable object stream
account API-quota/usage snapshot, not a syncable object stream

a GET-shaped user-feedback submission endpoint (reports incorrect metadata for a title via query parameters); it is a write-like side effect (email dispatch to Watchmode's team per SDK docs), not a stream to sync, and its only mutation shape is a same-request GET the dialect has no write action verb for
advanced release-dates feed is gated to paid Watchmode plans only (theatrical + streaming release dates); the free/base API key this connector is provisioned with returns 401 for this endpoint

ENGINE_GAP: response body is a bare JSON array of scalar title-id integers (`{"titles": [123, 456], ...}`), not an array of objects; connsdk.RecordsAt (and records.keyed_object, which only explodes object-valued map entries) both silently drop every element of a scalar-typed array, so no declarative stream shape can represent this endpoint's real wire response without either fabricating object structure the API doesn't return or emitting zero records; also gated to paid Watchmode plans (401 on this connector's free-tier key)
ENGINE_GAP: identical bare-scalar-array response shape as changes/new_titles (`{"people": [123, 456], ...}`) with no declarative fan-out-of-scalars mechanism; also paid-plan-gated
ENGINE_GAP: identical bare-scalar-array response shape (`{"titles": [123, 456], ...}`) as changes/new_titles; also paid-plan-gated
ENGINE_GAP: identical bare-scalar-array response shape as changes/new_titles; also paid-plan-gated
ENGINE_GAP: identical bare-scalar-array response shape as changes/new_titles; also paid-plan-gated
